title: oracle-matrix
description: Per-candidate adjudication record: what the signal was, which oracle ran, the verdict, and the controls that justify it. Captures BOTH confirmations and refutations so the casebook teaches false-positive discipline, not just wins.

signal.description: what the signal-oracle keyed on, abstracted

oracle.description: which oracle decided, e.g. adjudication-oracle, execution-oracle

negative.description: the plain/self control and its outcome

positive.description: the detector-works control, e.g. validating sibling route, fired canary

canary.description: the benign distinctive marker used, abstracted (never the literal value)
